name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide a forecasting model instead of manual tracking of invoices and payments.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of invoices and payments
